curation_notes: Patch adds a NULL check on s->avr (the avresample resampling context) immediately after aubio_source_avcodec_reset_resampler() in new_aubio_source_avcodec(). Only one source file changed (src/io/source_avcodec.c, +2 lines). Sibling source backends (source_sndfile.c, source_apple_audio.c, source_wavread.c) use different resampling mechanisms and do not share this pattern. Pre-assigned class null-deref (CWE-476) is correct.
